chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1743 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.7514/2023 3. For hearing of main case 26-03-2024 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondent-University Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the University submits that appeal of the petitioner is pending before Vice Chancellor against dismissal from service. Learned counsel for the University undertakes that within a month period appeal would be decided without fail by the competent authority. We dispose of this petition therefore in the above terms by directing the Vice Chancellor to decide the appeal of the petitioner within a month as undertaken. After which learned counsel for the University would be required to submit a compliance report in the court without fail. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
